sanskrit:
येऽप्यन्यदेवताभक्ता यजन्ते श्रद्धयान्विताः।
तेपि मामेव कौन्तेय यजन्त्यविधिपूर्वकम्॥
transliteration:
ye ’py anya-devatā-bhaktā yajante śraddhayānvitāḥ
te ’pi mām eva kaunteya yajanty avidhi-pūrvakam
literal_meaning: Even those devotees of other gods who worship with faith— they too are indeed worshipping Me alone, O Kaunteya, though not according to the proper method.
contextual_meaning: All sincere striving ultimately reaches the same Ground of Being, but misdirected loyalty keeps the person feeling separate and the benefits partial.
psychological_state: A person who pours energy into many fragmented self-care routines while ignoring the core wound experiences temporary relief but not deep healing.
trigger_scenario: You juggle meditation apps, supplements, and motivational podcasts yet still wake up anxious—realizing you’ve been watering the leaves, not the root.
anchor_text: All sincere devotion reaches the same source, yet right method dissolves separation.
